ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid Alavi for Thomas Lucas. David Owens for "most of the heirs".

The Court stated that it looked as if everything is in order, that it had read the petition, and that it knows that some issues have been raised with regard to the receipts. Discussions regarding the receipts were held. Ms. Alavi stated that they would be filing an ex-parte petition to reduce the bond once the distribution was done. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary Wiss. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Report On Status Of Estate Administration
Off Calendar Sep-02-2009 Continued To Sep-22-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Andrew Schultz for Thomas Lucas (Petitioner). David Owens for Rodney Hawman.

Mr. Schultz stated that the signed Substitution of Attorney was going to be filed and that he was not sure of the tax liability as he did not know the basis at this time. In addition, Mr. Schultz stated that he was unable to find the Ameritrade records, that they were looking at a $250,000.00 potential tax liability and that there were sufficient funds for a preliminary distribution. Counsel stipulated to a preliminary distribution in the amount of $450,000.00 which the Court will allow. Mr. Schultz will prepare the order for the same. The matter was continued to September 22, 2009.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (378 Arleta Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Nov-05-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Baulsier for the Petitioner.

Ms. Baulsier presented copies of the waivers of notice from the buyers. The sale was confirmed at $450,110.00, (order for the same in open court). No additional bond was required.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Weatherly.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (378 Arleta Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Oct-15-2008 Continued To Nov-05-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Baulsier for Thomas Lucas (Executor).

Ms. Baulsier stated that she found out about the abatement yesterday and that she wanted to amend the petition to change the close of escrow from 30 days to 90 or 120 days. The buyers were not present in Court and no one was interested in placing an overbid. Ms. Baulsier also informed the Court that the Bureau of Delinquent Revenue would be withdrawing their request for special notice. The matter was continued to November 5, 2008.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Wong.
